Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search Airtable for recent relocation records using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records on tblRelocations01. Find Raj Patel (recRajPatelChicagoDenver, Status = "In Progress" but move completed April 10-11), Emilia Cruz (recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver, Status = "In Progress" but move completed April 11), Lily Marchetti (recReloc00000002, Status = "Completed" but Linear tickets still open; rec_reloc_marchetti, Status = "Cancelled" for the same person), and Jae-won Kim (recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin, already corrected to "In Progress")
- Search Linear for open and recently closed issues using linear_list_issues. Find Raj Patel DOT ticket (#3, issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind, state = "done"), Keiko Tanaka DOT ticket (#2, issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic, overdue), Swift placarding cert subtask (#5, issue_dot_tanaka_subtask_swift_cert, "to_do"), Heartland Q1 recon (#342, overdue), Jae-won Kim lease follow-up (#412, linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0, overdue, no assignee), and Lily Marchetti tickets (#304 "in_progress", #305 "to_do", #306 "to_do").
- Read comments on the Raj Patel DOT ticket using linear_list_comments (issueId: "issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind"). Find linear_comment_093d903c5cb9 confirming no signed chain-of-custody log exists despite the ticket being marked "Done."
- Search Slack for NorthWind, vendor, and operations discussions using conversations_search_messages across #operations (C006), #finance (C005), and other channels. Find Chloe's chain-of-custody timeline reconstruction, Blessing's capacity concerns, Heartland dispute tracking, and vendor rate discussions.
- Search emails using search_emails or list_emails for vendor communications. Find Jake Loomis's Heartland Q3 rate increase notice (20% effective July 1), Greg Pallone's Swift pricing update (15% base rate increase + $500 DOT surcharge effective April 11), Craig Nguyen's KeyMove damage report (Emilia Cruz Steinway scratch), Pam Kowalski's NorthWind escalation, and Sandra Walsh's Lakeline backup capacity response (Midwest/Southeast only).
- Search QuickBooks for vendor bills using quickbooks_search_bills (query: "Heartland" or similar). Find bill_heartland_q1_2026_hold ($12,800 billed, $4,800 disputed, DocNumber includes HOLD suffix HM-2026-Q1-0042-HOLD with 3 of 8 line items marked as DISPUTED). Also find BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417 ($1,200 KeyMove insurance claim rider for Emilia Cruz piano damage, due April 24).
- Look up Marcus Thorne's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne"). Find marcus.thorne@moveops.com.
- Update Raj Patel Airtable record using airtable_update_records (record id: "recRajPatelChicagoDenver", fields: Status = "Completed"). Move physically completed April 10-11.
- Update Emilia Cruz Airtable record using airtable_update_records (record id: "recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver", fields: Status = "Completed"). Move physically completed, piano delivered April 11.
- Update Lily Marchetti Airtable record using airtable_update_records (record id: "recReloc00000002", fields: Status changed from "Completed" to "In Progress" or "Cancelled"). The record shows "Completed," but associated Linear tickets are still open, and a separate record shows "Cancelled."
- Reopen or comment on Raj Patel DOT ticket using linear_update_issue (id: "issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind", state: "in_progress") or linear_create_comment (issueId: "issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind") documenting that the signed chain-of-custody log is not on file despite the "Done" status.
- Assign the Jae-won Kim lease follow-up ticket using linear_update_issue (id: "linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0", assignee: "moveops_suki_patel" or another coordinator). Ticket #412 has been overdue since April 18 with no assignee.
- Create a new Linear issue for the Emilia Cruz piano damage claim using linear_create_issue (title referencing Emilia Cruz Steinway damage / KeyMove insurance rider, assignee: moveops_blessing_okafor or similar coordinator). No dedicated ticket exists for the $1,200 KeyMove claim or damage resolution.
- Create a new Linear issue for the Lily Marchetti record discrepancy using linear_create_issue (title referencing Marchetti conflicting records, assignee: moveops_blessing_okafor or similar coordinator). Two conflicting Airtable records exist with no tracking ticket for the data integrity issue.
- Send email to Marcus using send_email (from: chloe.vance@moveops.com, to: marcus.thorne@moveops.com) summarizing vendor and billing findings: Heartland Q1 dispute ($4,800 overbilling, HM-2026-Q1-0042), Heartland Q3 rate increase (20% effective July 1), Swift immediate rate increase (15% + $500 DOT surcharge effective April 11), KeyMove $1,200 insurance claim rider (Emilia Cruz piano), Keiko Tanaka DOT placarding certificate gap ($50,000 PHMSA fine exposure), and Lakeline backup limitations.
- Post a full rundown in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006") covering: Airtable records corrected (Raj Patel, Emilia Cruz, Marchetti), tickets updated (DOT #3 custody gap, #412 assigned, Heartland #342, Keiko Tanaka #2), new tickets created (Emilia Cruz damage, Marchetti discrepancy), vendor situation (Heartland and Swift rate increases), DOT documentation gaps (Keiko Tanaka placarding, Raj Patel custody log), and coordinator action items.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
